```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4843024894782521597
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \\\n    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\nCOPY pyproject.toml README.md /app/\nCOPY mini_celery /app/mini_celery\nCOPY scripts /app/scripts\nCOPY config /app/config\nCOPY tests /app/tests\n\nRUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip \\\n    && pip install --no-cache-dir \".[dev]\"\n\nRUN mkdir -p /app/data\n\nCMD [\"uvicorn\", \"mini_celery.api.main:app\", \"--host\", \"0.0.0.0\", \"--port\", \"8000\"]\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "1e257a30cbe293347d5d6dbca0c630f99659c67a207c6558ee1901695e112251",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport argparse\nimport subprocess\nimport sys\n\n\ndef run(cmd: list[str]) -> int:\n    print(\"$\", \" \".join(cmd), flush=True)\n    return subprocess.call(cmd)\n\n\ndef main() -> int:\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Fallback task runner when make is unavailable\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"command\", choices=[\"up\", \"down\", \"lint\", \"test\", \"loadtest\"])\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    if args.command == \"up\":\n        return run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"up\", \"--build\", \"-d\"])\n    if args.command == \"down\":\n        return run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"down\", \"-v\"])\n    if args.command == \"lint\":\n        steps = [\n            [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"ruff\", \"check\", \".\"],\n            [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"ruff\", \"format\", \"--check\", \".\"],\n            [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"mypy\", \"mini_celery\"],\n        ]\n        for step in steps:\n            code = run(step)\n            if code:\n                return code\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"test\":\n        code = run(\n            [\n                \"docker\",\n                \"compose\",\n                \"-f\",\n                \"docker-compose.test.yml\",\n                \"up\",\n                \"--build\",\n                \"--abort-on-container-exit\",\n                \"--exit-code-from\",\n                \"test\",\n            ]\n        )\n        down_code = run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"-f\", \"docker-compose.test.yml\", \"down\", \"-v\"])\n        return code or down_code\n    if args.command == \"loadtest\":\n        return run(\n            [\n                sys.executable,\n                \"-m\",\n                \"mini_celery.cli\",\n                \"loadtest\",\n                \"--total\",\n                \"100\",\n                \"--concurrency\",\n                \"10\",\n                \"--task-type\",\n                \"sleep\",\n                \"--payload\",\n                '{\"seconds\":0.05}',\n            ]\n        )\n\n    return 1\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    raise SystemExit(main())\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "a9c50d15cc18d953defe529a1bf387c774bacc88d69f508bbd4ae88f91d24995",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "[build-system]\nrequires = [\"hatchling>=1.24.0\"]\nbuild-backend = \"hatchling.build\"\n\n[project]\nname = \"mini-celery\"\nversion = \"0.1.0\"\ndescription = \"Local production-style job queue + scheduler using FastAPI, Redis Streams, and SQLite\"\nreadme = \"README.md\"\nrequires-python = \">=3.12\"\nlicense = { text = \"MIT\" }\nauthors = [{ name = \"mini-celery\" }]\ndependencies = [\n  \"fastapi>=0.115.0\",\n  \"uvicorn[standard]>=0.31.0\",\n  \"redis>=5.1.0\",\n  \"SQLAlchemy>=2.0.36\",\n  \"pydantic>=2.9.2\",\n  \"pydantic-settings>=2.6.0\",\n  \"httpx>=0.27.2\",\n  \"prometheus-client>=0.21.0\",\n  \"typer>=0.12.5\",\n  \"croniter>=5.0.1\",\n  \"PyYAML>=6.0.2\"\n]\n\n[project.optional-dependencies]\ndev = [\n  \"pytest>=8.3.3\",\n  \"pytest-asyncio>=0.24.0\",\n  \"pytest-cov>=5.0.0\",\n  \"ruff>=0.8.0\",\n  \"mypy>=1.11.2\",\n  \"types-PyYAML>=6.0.12.20240917\"\n]\n\n[project.scripts]\nmini-celery = \"mini_celery.cli:app\"\n\n[tool.pytest.ini_options]\naddopts = \"-q\"\nasyncio_mode = \"auto\"\nmarkers = [\n  \"integration: marks integration tests\"\n]\n\n[tool.ruff]\nline-length = 100\ntarget-version = \"py312\"\n\n[tool.ruff.lint]\nselect = [\"E\", \"F\", \"I\", \"UP\", \"B\", \"SIM\", \"RUF\"]\n\n[tool.ruff.format]\nquote-style = \"double\"\nindent-style = \"space\"\n\n[tool.mypy]\npython_version = \"3.12\"\nstrict = true\nwarn_unused_ignores = true\nwarn_redundant_casts = true\nwarn_return_any = true\ndisallow_any_generics = true\nexclude = [\"tests/\"]\n\n[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]\npackages = [\"mini_celery\"]\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "8fe10ee09bb18a8671622c1d93bf1e6375f6ce934b987604123e2086ae23a36d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "schedules:\n  - id: pipeline-minute\n    cron: \"* * * * *\"\n    queue: default\n    type: pipeline_demo\n    payload:\n      steps: [\"extract\", \"transform\", \"load\"]\n      step_delay: 0.1\n    max_attempts: 3\n    enabled: false\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "3e5ff9fbb851bd1b485f26bd2b406f0d65eec5494031ae704cd29d239e4f198b",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```
